content.en:
Created the Shattered Void Origin Control Technique, Ye Tian's strength reached the level of a Six Realms level controller.

Then, he appeared in front of the Yanyan Controller and the Halftooth Controller.

At this time, the Yan Yan Controller and the Half Tooth Controller were extremely shocked.

"Senior Brother Ye, have you stepped into the realm of the Six Realms level controller?"

The Half-Tooth Controller was shocked.

"Lucky breakthrough!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

By the skin of one's teeth?

This is a fluke, it can only show that Ye Tian's qualifications and comprehension are too strong, reaching a level that they can't imagine.

For example, the half-tooth master himself, he is very confident in his talent, but he does not expect to reach the level of the six-realm master, even if he obtains the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, his goal is only the master of the third or fourth realms.

The Six Realms-level Masters were too far away for him.

"Two junior brothers, I am now sure to take away the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, and when I have thoroughly studied the magic circle here, I will take this statue of Ten Thousand Phases away. Ye Tian said.

"Everything is subject to Senior Brother Ye's arrangement!"

The Half-Tooth Controller and the Yanyan Controller nodded.

If they can take it away, it is naturally a good thing, if they are enlightened, they can be enlightened, if there are other things, they can leave temporarily, but not in this cave blessed land, once they leave, it is also a troublesome thing to come in, and they have to rely on Ye Tian's help to come in.

Therefore, it is very inconvenient to go out or leave.

Now, they haven't gone back for a long time, and even the incarnation has run out of energy because they can't hold on, and they don't know anything about the outside world.

So, they still want to get out of here.

In the following days, Ye Tian studied the magic circle here.

With his realm and attainments as a six-realm level controller, he gradually learned a lot about the magic circle here.

At this moment, he roughly judged the level of the powerhouse who arranged this magic circle, probably a seventh-realm level controller, or an eighth-realm level controller, but it was not the former black ancestor, so it was not clear.

However, the possibilities are high.

Time passed, Ye Tian gradually analyzed the magic circle here, and in the case that no one was in control, he cracked the magic circle and took away the statue of ten thousand phases, which was still very confident.

Of course, he couldn't control the magic circle here, at least he needed the strength of a seventh-level controller or above.

He can't reach it now!

this day.

Ye Tian was finally sure to take away the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, and countless seals were cast from his hands, and the dense seals were integrated into the magic circle, and in an instant, it affected the operation of the magic circle.

Then, Ye Tian grabbed the statue of Wanxiang with one hand, grabbed it fiercely, and directly moved it away.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left this Cave Heaven Blessed Land with the Yanyan Controller and the Half-Tooth Controller.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian placed the statue of Wanxiang in Tongyang Mountain, and the Half-Tooth Controller and Yan Yan Controller obtained the qualification to enter Tongyang Mountain, and they could practice in Tongyang Mountain.

And when Ye Tian took out the statue of Wanxiang and placed it in the cultivation time and space of Tongyang Mountain, the spirit of Tongyang Pagoda was suddenly stunned.

Tongyang Pagoda Instrument Spirit recognized the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, to be precise, when he followed the Tongyang Controller, he personally saw a great Seven Realms-level controller fused with the Ten Thousand Phases Statue and killed another Seven Realms-level controller.

"My master actually obtained a statue of ten thousand faces!"

Tongyang Pagoda Artifact Spirit was a little unbelievable.

Before, Ye Tian got a lot of boundary river monuments, although it was surprised, it just felt that Ye Tian's luck was good, but now this luck is too against the sky, and even got a statue of Wanxiang.

"The strength of my master has reached the level of the Six Realms Master, if it is fused with the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, wouldn't it be comparable to the combat power of the Level Seven Realms Controller?"

Although Ye Tian is not yet a Seven Realms level controller, to a certain extent, he is equivalent to a Seven Realms level controller!

Accidentally, he turned out to be a machine spirit in the hands of a Seven Realm-level master, which was enough to be proud.

In the days that followed, the Yan Yan Masters and the Half Tooth Masters occasionally visited the Wanxiang Statue and occasionally left.

In fact, it's very difficult for them to improve now.

For example, Yan Yan's controller and the half-tooth controller, one is now a first-realm-level controller, and the other is a second-realm controller, they have almost reached their extreme, even if it is a statue of ten thousand phases, it will take hundreds of millions of years of enlightenment before it is possible to improve a little.

this day.

Ye Tian discussed a matter with Yan Yan's controller and the half-tooth master.

Tongyang Mountain, the three of them sat together.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said: "Two junior brothers, it is not very easy for you to comprehend the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, if you have been comprehending, I will not be able to use the Ten Thousand Phases Statue to fuse and fight." I have a proposal, I wonder if you agree with it?"

"Senior Brother Ye, please speak. "

The Half-Tooth Controller knew Ye Tian's plans, but he believed that Ye Tian would give them appropriate compensation.

"The two junior disciples should know about Tuta, right?" Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

The Half-Tooth Controller and the Yan Yan Controller nodded.

Ye Tian proposed: "I can give you a few small keys, some big treasure boxes and small treasure boxes, let you open them yourself, or use the small keys to exchange for the resources of Tuta." There are still a lot of treasures in the Tuta that are sure of the first-realm level masters and the second-level masters, and there are even many treasures that can help improve the will or control the body. I think your strength should be able to increase a lot, and it shouldn't be a problem to move up a level. "

Yan Yan and the Half Tooth Masters had heard that Ye Tian was very lucky, and he had obtained a lot of small keys, large treasure boxes, and small treasure boxes, and even obtained multiple keys, which were exchanged for many boundary river monuments.

Although the value of the Jiehe Monument is far inferior to that of the Wanxiang Statue, they themselves take advantage of Ye Tian, so naturally their requirements cannot be too high.

Moreover, some resources were even more helpful to them than the Wanxiang Statue, and the Wanxiang Statue was even more helpful to Ye Tian, but this was not the case for them.

Therefore, Ye Tian's suggestion was more beneficial to them.

If he obtained those resources in the Tuta, he could at least hope that he would be able to rise to the level of the Three Realms level controller within a certain period of time, which would be faster and more effective than slowly comprehending the Ten Thousand Phases Statue to improve his strength.

The Yan Yan Controller and the Half Tooth Controller pondered for a while, discussed it again, and finally agreed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian discussed the specific compensation with the two junior disciples in detail, and in short, they were all satisfied.
